children.name: My Applications is a way for you to track jobs as you move through the application process. Depending on the job you applied to, you may also receive notifications indicating that an application has been actioned by an employer.
children.characters: My Applications is a way for you to track jobs as you move through the application process. Depending on the job you applied to, you may also receive notifications indicating that an application has been actioned by an employer.

children.name: What is My Applications?
children.characters: How to access my applications history

children.name: My Applications is a way for you to track jobs as you move through the application process. Depending on the job you applied to, you may also receive notifications indicating that an application has been actioned by an employer.
children.characters: To access applications history, go to your My Applications page on your dashboard profile. You must be signed in to your JobHuntly account to view this page.

children.name: What is My Applications?
children.characters: Not seeing jobs you applied in your my application list?

children.name: My Applications is a way for you to track jobs as you move through the application process. Depending on the job you applied to, you may also receive notifications indicating that an application has been actioned by an employer.
children.characters: Please note that we are unable to track materials submitted for jobs you apply to via an employer's site. As a result, these applications are not recorded in the My Applications section of your JobHuntly account. We suggest keeping a personal record of all positions you have applied to externally.
